security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local Git insight and report tray app
bundle.longDescription: GitSage is a local-first Git insight and report tray app for macOS and Windows.
